---
title: "MindBoost – Mental Wellbeing App"
description: "A New Enterprise Development project creating a mental wellbeing app for young adults aged 18-30."
author: "Jenny Höglauer"
date: "2026-04-02"
categories: [Entrepreneurship, Business Development, App Design]
image: ../../images/mockup.jpeg


---

## Overview

MindBoost is a mental wellbeing app developed as part of the New Enterprise 
Development module at Dublin City University. As **CEO** of the project, 
I led a team of five students to design, research and pitch a digital 
solution for young adults struggling with stress and anxiety.

![MindBoost Pitch Flyer](../../images/ned_flyer.jpeg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## App Flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Mood Check-in] --> B[AI Analysis]
  B --> C[Personalised Tips]
  C --> D[Daily Exercises]
  D --> E[Therapist Access]
```
![MindBoost App Mockup](../../images/mockup.jpeg){width=50% fig-align="center"}

## The Problem

Young people aged 18-30 face increasing levels of stress and anxiety, 
yet existing mental health solutions are often too clinical, expensive 
or time-consuming for daily use.

## Our Solution

MindBoost offers personalised daily mental wellbeing support through:

- 🧠 **AI-personalised tips** based on mood tracking
- 📓 **Daily check-ins** with journaling and breathing exercises
- 🎯 **Short activities** that fit into a 5-minute daily routine
- 👨‍⚕️ **Direct therapist access** for professional support

![MindBoost Website](../../images/ned_website.jpeg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

## Key Research Insights

| Insight | Result |
|---------|--------|
| Users find daily check-ins highly useful | 67.8% |
| Appreciate direct therapist access | 67.6% |
| Willing to pay €4.99+ per month | 35% |


## My Role

As CEO, I was responsible for overall strategy, team coordination and 
the final pitch presentation at DCU Business School. The project culminated in a live pitch at DCU Business School, where our team 
presented MindBoost to a panel of judges and industry professionals. The 
experience gave us valuable exposure to real-world entrepreneurship and 
investor communication.

![MindBoost Team at NED Pitch](../../images/ned_group_photo.jpeg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

::: {.callout-note}
This project was developed as part of the New Enterprise Development Programme at DCU Business School.
:::

## Data Analysis

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| fig-cap: "MindBoost User Research Results"

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

insights = ['Daily check-ins\nhighly useful', 'Therapist\naccess', 'Willing to pay\n€4.99+/month']
values = [67.8, 67.6, 35.0]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))
bars = ax.barh(insights, values, color=['#1B6B7B', '#29CADE', '#A0A4A8'])
ax.set_xlabel('Percentage (%)')
ax.set_xlim(0, 100)
for bar, val in zip(bars, values):
    ax.text(val + 1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}%', va='center')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
